name: Dark Apotheosis
how_to_get:
Talk to Mor'Zul in northwestern corner of Burning Steppes to start the questline.
After finishing the Dreadsteed questline, Mor'Zul will offer you the quest for Dark Apotheosis.
NOTE: The steed in Dire Maul is outside Immol'thars barrier so you can skip the pylons and the summoning ritual!

name: Legacy of the Arcanist
how_to_get:
This Enchant requires you to go between Netherstorm and Shadowmoon Valley
(The Ascension team has chosen not to include linkable NPC entries for the characters related to this quest at time of writing)

Start at NPC "Zethil" in Netherstorm @ 59,41
She will require you to recover the staff floating in an orb near her, if you don't have flying, make sure to position yourself between her and the cliffs edge, sometimes the trajectory will bug out and you won't go in the right direction otherwise. (Picking it up appears to be buggy at the moment and some people have had to spam click multiple times)

Acquire the staff and head to "High Arcanist Aethil" in Shadowmoon Valley @ 44,42
In the Fel-magma at the bottom of the hill there should be a crater that is clickable, speak to the high arcanist if it is up be zapped into the air, there should be 12 glowing spheres in 4 different colors (representing the elements of the enchant) get one of each by flying through them, then return to the crater, click it, and receive the scroll in your inventory.

name: Arcane Thunder Seer
how_to_get:
This is a 4 step RE to obtain.
Warning, these books have a 30 minute timer!
(TL:DR There is a book near every Enchanting Altar, collect all 4 and combine them)
Be in Eastern Kingdoms for step 1&2
Be in Kalimdor for step 3&4

Step 1: First book can be found in Karazhan Crypts in the Enchanting Altar room on top of the bookcase

Step 2: Second book can be found next to the Dalaran Crater near the altar inside a chimney (this one is the usable book to combine all 4 books) - WARNING: This one appears to be missing, it may have been moved!

Step 3: Make way to Azshara's Enchanting table inside the mage tower. On top of the tower on some bookshelves should be the 3rd book

Step 4: For the final book make way to Silithus and go to the twilight encampment where the Enchanting Table lies. Nearby is a wooden cart that has the final book inside.

name: Wave Of Despair
how_to_get:
Killing 4 distinct 'ghost' npcs around black temple like Haruuma.
They are around on the ground and on the temple itself. 
Equip track humanioids and look for green icons (non hostile).
They emote, become hostile and then attack.
